title: Software Development Methods & Methodologies Spectrum
description: A flowchart showing the relationship between core software development methodologies, from traditional to agile, and their key components.
relationships: Traditional methodologies like Waterfall are sequential, while Agile methods like Scrum and Kanban are iterative and incremental. Hybrid approaches combine elements of both. DevOps extends Agile principles into operations. Spiral model incorporates prototyping and risk analysis.
